The game is over. The state says "GAME_OVER" and "run_complete: false". This means the game ended but the run isn't complete (there might be more levels). Let me check the current state to understand what happened.
The yellow bar was at 60/64 before the game over. I was trying to match the bottom-left complement pattern, but the game ended after only 2 of the 4 clicks.
Let me check the current state to see if there's a new level or if the game truly ended.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

print("Yellow elements:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'Y':
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"  pixels={n['pixels']}, rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

print(f"\nLevel: {current_frame.level}")
print(f"Step: {current_frame.step}")
print(f"Shape: {current_frame.shape}")

print("\nBottom-right outer cells:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] == 36:
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        if min(rows) >= 36 and min(cols) >= 36:
            print(f"  ({min(rows)},{min(cols)}): {n['color']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
